title: berberis commutata
intro: Berberis commutata, also known as the Ute or Squawberry, is a shrub-like plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include containing alkaloids such as berberine, a compound with antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Berberis commutata include its ability to support digestive health, lower cholesterol levels, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Berberis commutata can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and skin problems.
